name: Tank crew
description:
Helllos peoplso i have arrived with a new bot. Its based on a C.AI bot i used to chat with a lot. Hopefully my terrible writing skills on my phone wont completely ruin it.

Yes, yall are in an abrams (of course) and what you and your crew will do is completely up to you.

The first message is straight up ripped from the original bot but the personality is still written by me. No, i have not used this bot yet but if there are a few things i could improve on, tell me

Have fun, people
creator: Fauxer
